title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](toplist_images/bgg_50b3f686.jpg)

2. **Drillers**
*2026*
Mine for minerals, upgrade your deck and manage your resources carefully.
![Drillers](toplist_images/bgg_65ca94d8.jpg)

3. **Fossilium**
*2025*
Manage a natural history museum and collect astonishing fossils. 
![Fossilium](toplist_images/bgg_67aa82a5.jpg)

4. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](toplist_images/bgg_a77275dd.jpg)

5. **WunderWaffen**
*2025*
A strategy game on the final days of World War II 
![WunderWaffen](toplist_images/bgg_b56df3b1.png)

6. **Mage Knight: Emergence – The Portal to Power**
*2027*
Train your skills and build your legend in the Mage Knight universe!
![Mage Knight: Emergence – The Portal to Power](toplist_images/bgg_27e83675.jpg)

7. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](toplist_images/bgg_5585d54c.jpg)

8. **All In: Predictions**
*2026*
Foretellers manage their hand of cards and try to see through opponents.
![All In: Predictions](toplist_images/bgg_71c80eff.png)

9. **Puerto Rico 1897: Special Edition**
*2025*
Manage a local farm, construct buildings, and trade goods in Puerto Rico. 
![Puerto Rico 1897: Special Edition](toplist_images/bgg_cbe5ec18.jpg)

10. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](toplist_images/bgg_81ce9faf.jpg)

11. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](toplist_images/bgg_6fa0cf12.png)

12. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](toplist_images/bgg_ab95a85a.png)

13. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](toplist_images/bgg_a3281edf.png)

14. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](toplist_images/bgg_727cdae5.jpg)

15. **Concordia**
*2013*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia](toplist_images/bgg_ebda0cb3.jpg)

16. **PDX**
*2026*
Become Portland's favorite airline by opening routes across the globe.
![PDX](toplist_images/bgg_186199ab.jpg)

17. **The Lord of the Rings: Foes of Middle-earth**
*2026*
Explore an ever-changing Middle-earth to strengthen yourself and defeat the Balrog.
![The Lord of the Rings: Foes of Middle-earth](toplist_images/bgg_ba711444.jpg)

18. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](toplist_images/bgg_08097707.jpg)

19. **Defenders of the Wild**
*2024*
Cooperate with other animal factions against the machine invasion.
![Defenders of the Wild](toplist_images/bgg_ff9ea0ab.jpg)

20. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](toplist_images/bgg_56ba1bab.jpg)

21. **Mage Knight: The Apocalypse Dragon**
*2026*
Explore and conquer a corner of the Mage Knight universe!
![Mage Knight: The Apocalypse Dragon](toplist_images/bgg_e824e5c6.jpg)

22. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](toplist_images/bgg_61ed16eb.png)

23. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](toplist_images/bgg_38744d94.jpg)

24. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](toplist_images/bgg_1c69291b.jpg)

25. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](toplist_images/bgg_9fb55d78.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*14 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](toplist_images/bgg_79f18bdf.jpg)

2. **Wingspan**
*86 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](toplist_images/bgg_264fac5b.jpg)

3. **Harmonies**
*22 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](toplist_images/bgg_89aa0a21.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*17 months on the list*
Combine Medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](toplist_images/bgg_d041a958.jpg)

5. **Ark Nova**
*50 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](toplist_images/bgg_4fd9d199.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*10 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](toplist_images/bgg_6cf0f828.png)

7. **Azul**
*100 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](toplist_images/bgg_4b19b2aa.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*113 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](toplist_images/bgg_8adaf639.jpg)

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*39 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](toplist_images/bgg_75a0eacc.jpg)

10. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*62 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](toplist_images/bgg_aa9397b2.jpg)

11. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*32 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](toplist_images/bgg_d321d20a.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*29 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](toplist_images/bgg_a48055dd.jpg)

13. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*15 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](toplist_images/bgg_301e38a8.jpg)

14. **Cascadia**
*55 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](toplist_images/bgg_495fd3bf.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*29 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](toplist_images/bgg_3ce43214.jpg)

16. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*8 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](toplist_images/bgg_d9c004d9.jpg)

17. **Faraway**
*22 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](toplist_images/bgg_ae075d0a.png)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*1 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](toplist_images/bgg_17ea174c.png)

19. **The Gang**
*8 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](toplist_images/bgg_4b6acc33.jpg)

20. **Carcassonne**
*272 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](toplist_images/bgg_80627807.jpg)

21. **Toy Battle**
*1 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](toplist_images/bgg_d952b2a1.jpg)

22. **The White Castle**
*28 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](toplist_images/bgg_e4df390c.jpg)

23. **Splendor**
*142 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](toplist_images/bgg_1e95c3ed.jpg)

24. **Take Time**
*3 months on the list*
Time beckons you to discover a multitude of challenging universes.
![Take Time](toplist_images/bgg_12db16ad.png)

25. **Agent Avenue**
*2 months on the list*
Retired spies in a suburban neighborhood race to discover each other's secrets.
![Agent Avenue](toplist_images/bgg_a3485515.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com
